attributes.title: Reeflex — Verdict breakdown
attributes.visState: {"title": "Verdict breakdown", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "data.verdict", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: Reeflex — Decisions over time (by verdict)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Decisions over time", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "useNormalizedOSDTimeRange": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "data.verdict", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "addTooltip": true, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true}, "title": {"text": "Decisions"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "grid": {"categoryLines": false}}}

attributes.title: Reeflex — Top rules fired
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top rules fired", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "data.rule_id", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "addLegend": false, "addTooltip": true, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "showCircles": true}], "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "orderBucketsBySum": false}}

attributes.title: Reeflex — Recent denies (ability / rule / src)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Recent denies", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "data.ability", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "data.rule_id", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "data.srcip", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: Reeflex — Gate decisions (CISO / SOC)
attributes.description: Community example, unmaintained. Deterministic AI-action gate decisions from reeflex-core via standard syslog — no custom connector.
